title: Honoring the 2026 Distinguished Achievement Award winners
summary_en: On April 24, 2026, the School of Computer, Data & Information Sciences celebrated outstanding alumni who have made significant contributions to the fields of computer science, statistics, data science, and information science.
title_cn: 表彰2026年度杰出成就奖获奖人员

title: Artificial Intelligence by Wisconsin, for Wisconsin
summary_en: UW–Madison researchers propose an inclusive artificial intelligence system, incorporating voices and perspectives from across Wisconsin.
title_cn: 由威斯康星研发、服务威斯康星的人工智能
